synthesis.driver: US-Iran threats over Hormuz escalate war-risk premium, lifting Brent $3 despite oversupply capping spikes.
synthesis.based_on: Oil prices rise another 3%, while Wall Street drifts in mixed trading - San Diego Union-Tribune

takes.trump threatens to bomb iranian bridges: Trump's bridge-bombing threats escalate Hormuz tensions, lifting Brent on war-risk premium.
takes.us rejects iran s claim of control over: US rejection of Iran's Hormuz control claim fuels escalation, pushing Brent higher.
takes.ghalibaf situation in strait of hormuz w: Iran's statement signals prolonged instability in Hormuz, sustaining upward pressure on Brent.
takes.trump declares we don t need the hormuz: Trump's dismissal of Hormuz importance tempers price surge, but war-risk premium persists.
